query:
SELECT id, partnerId, cityId, contractStatus, 
       CASE 
         WHEN contractStatus = 'active' THEN 'YES_ACTIVE'
         WHEN contractStatus = 'draft' THEN 'YES_DRAFT'
         ELSE CONCAT('OTHER:', contractStatus)
       END as status_check
FROM partner_cities 
WHERE partnerId = 30002;

         WHEN contractStatus = 'draft' THEN 'YES_DRAFT'
